# Spires Digital

> Data-driven digital marketing agency based in Lichfield, Staffordshire, UK. We help businesses grow through transparent, performance-focused PPC management, Meta Ads, affiliate marketing, and Shopify development.

## About

Spires Digital is a digital marketing agency with over 15 years of experience managing more than £10M in ad spend across 150+ campaigns. We operate on a growth partnership model — our pricing is structured so our success is tied directly to yours: £1,200/month base fee plus 5% of profitable revenue we generate.

We are a Google Partner, Bing Ads Certified, GA4 Expert, Shopify Partner, and Affiliate Window Certified.

Key principles:
- Full transparency: clients own all their advertising accounts and have complete access to every metric
- No long-term contracts: month-to-month agreements with 30 days notice
- Data-driven: every strategy is backed by analytics and performance data
- Results-focused: we optimise for business outcomes (revenue, leads, profit), not vanity metrics

Contact: jack@spiresdigital.com
Location: Guernsey, Channel Islands & Lichfield, Staffordshire, United Kingdom
Website: https://spiresdigital.com

## Services

### PPC Management (Google & Bing Ads)
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/ppc-management/
Expert management of Google Ads and Bing Ads campaigns including Search, Shopping, Display, YouTube, and Performance Max. Average 250% ROAS improvement across our client portfolio. Services include campaign strategy, keyword research, ad copy creation, conversion tracking setup, bid management, A/B testing, and monthly reporting with strategy calls.
Pricing: £1,200/month + 5% of profitable revenue generated.

### Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram)
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/meta-ads/
Full-funnel Facebook and Instagram advertising including campaign strategy, audience targeting, creative testing, retargeting, catalogue/shopping ads, and Conversions API setup. Systematic A/B testing framework to identify and scale winning creative.
Pricing: £1,200/month + 5% of profitable revenue generated.

### Affiliate Management
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/affiliate-management/
Complete affiliate program setup and management on AWIN, CJ Affiliate, Rakuten, and Impact networks. Includes partner recruitment, commission structure design, creative asset provision, performance monitoring, coupon policing, and compliance management.
Pricing: £1,200/month + 5% of profitable revenue generated.

### Shopify Website Builds
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/services/shopify-builds/
Custom Shopify store development including theme customisation or bespoke builds, checkout optimisation, payment gateway integration, migration from other platforms (WooCommerce, Magento), and ongoing support. Typical project timeline: 4-8 weeks.
Pricing: Standard stores from £3,000, custom builds from £5,000+, ongoing support from £300/month.

## Industry Expertise

### E-Commerce
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/industries/ecommerce/
Specialist in Google Shopping, Performance Max, Meta catalogue ads, and affiliate programs for online retailers.

### SaaS
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/industries/saas/
B2B lead generation, demo booking campaigns, and targeted advertising for software companies.

### Local Business
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/industries/local-business/
Local PPC, Google Business Profile optimisation, and geo-targeted advertising for service-area businesses.

## Content / Blog

### Google Ads Quality Score Guide
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/blog/google-ads-quality-score-guide/
Comprehensive guide covering what Quality Score is, how it affects CPCs, and proven strategies to improve Expected CTR, Ad Relevance, and Landing Page Experience.

### Meta Ads Creative Testing Framework
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/blog/meta-ads-creative-testing-framework/
Systematic three-phase approach to testing ad creative on Facebook and Instagram: concept testing, format testing, and iteration.

### Technical SEO Audit Checklist 2026
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/blog/seo-technical-audit-checklist/
Step-by-step checklist covering crawlability, Core Web Vitals, site architecture, schema markup, and mobile/security.

### Performance Max Campaigns Guide
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/blog/performance-max-campaigns-guide/
Practical guide to structuring, launching, and optimising Performance Max campaigns for e-commerce growth.

### Affiliate Program Setup Guide
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/blog/affiliate-program-setup-guide/
Complete guide to choosing networks, setting commission structures, recruiting partners, and managing for profitability.

### GA4 Conversion Tracking Setup
URL: https://spiresdigital.com/blog/ga4-conversion-tracking-setup/
Complete setup guide for GA4 event tracking, Google Tag Manager configuration, and Google Ads conversion import.

## Case Study Results (anonymised)
- E-Commerce: 250% ROAS increase, 68% CPA reduction, 3.2x revenue growth
- SaaS: 3x lead increase, 45% CPC reduction, 2.8x pipeline growth
- Local Services: 340% organic traffic increase, #1 local rankings, 180% lead increase
- Retail Affiliate: 25% revenue share from affiliate channel, 120+ active partners, 8.5x program ROI
- E-Commerce Migration: 2.1x conversion rate after Shopify migration, 65% faster load time
- DTC Brand: 5x ROAS on Meta, 42% lower CPA, 4x ad spend scaled
